situations: You work at a grocery store and a customer asks where things are.
A customer is looking for halal meat or fish.
A customer needs help finding ingredients.
A parent brings a sick child to the clinic.
A patient asks how to see a doctor.
Someone asks where the pharmacy is.
A passenger asks which bus goes downtown.
A passenger asks how much the fare is.
Someone asks where to get off the bus.
A parent asks how to register their child for school.
A parent asks where the classroom is.
